Interface ISymbolicEquivalenceClass

All Superinterfaces:
ISymbolicElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
SymbolicEquivalenceClass, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessEquivalenceClass
public interface ISymbolicEquivalenceClass extends ISymbolicElement
An equivalence class which defines which JTerms represent the same ISymbolicObject in an ISymbolicLayout.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    containsTerm(JTerm term)
    Checks if a JTerm is contained.
    JTerm
    getRepresentative()
    Returns the most representative term.
    String
    getRepresentativeString()
    Returns the most representative term as human readable String.
    ImmutableList<JTerm>
    getTerms()
    Returns the terms which represents the same ISymbolicObject.
    ImmutableList<String>
    getTermStrings()
    Returns the terms which represents the same ISymbolicObject as human readable String.

  • Method Details

    • getTerms

      ImmutableList<JTerm> getTerms()
      Returns the terms which represents the same ISymbolicObject.

    • containsTerm

      boolean containsTerm(JTerm term)
      Checks if a JTerm is contained.
      Parameters:
      term - The JTerm to check.
      Returns:
      true JTerm is contained, false JTerm is not contained.

    • getTermStrings

      The terms which represents the same ISymbolicObject as human readable String.
